## Chinese holiday data checklist

- [ ] If this PR adds or changes bundled holiday data, I attached the official notice link
- [ ] I updated the corresponding `src/main/resources/io/jenkins/plugins/chinese_workday/calendars/<year>.properties`
- [ ] I updated `src/main/resources/io/jenkins/plugins/chinese_workday/calendars/index.properties` when needed
- [ ] I kept a `# Source: ...` comment in each changed calendar file
- [ ] I added or updated automated tests for representative holidays and make-up workdays
- [ ] I ran the relevant validation commands locally
